verdicts.note: Support for health-care access does not resolve the rubric's system-design choice between strengthening current insurance structures and universal public or single-payer coverage.
Gun-violence prevention does not by itself resolve this axis between enforcement and prevention, treatment, diversion, housing-first, or non-police response.

review_notes: All 8 original candidate-axis pairs were reviewed exactly once (6 upheld, 2 refuted). No additional omitted axis had sufficiently specific dossier support.
